member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.BusinessTransitionEvidence`1
member.summary: Observable evidence that a business model changed from one meaningful state to another.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.BusinessTransitionEvidence`1.#ctor(System.String,System.String,`0,`0,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Observable evidence that a business model changed from one meaningful state to another.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.BusinessTransitionEvidence`1.EvidenceType
member.summary: Stable classifier for business transition evidence.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.IBusinessEvidence
member.summary: Evidence emitted to make meaningful business behavior observable and auditable.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.IBusinessEvidence.EvidenceType
member.summary: Stable classifier for the kind of business evidence.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.IBusinessEvidence.ObservedAt
member.summary: Time when the evidence was observed or produced.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.IBusinessEvidenceSink
member.summary: Destination for business evidence. Adapters can forward evidence to logs, tracing, metrics, or audit stores.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.IBusinessEvidenceSink.WriteAsync(TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.IBusinessEvidence,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes business evidence to an external sink.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.InvariantViolationEvidence
member.summary: Observable evidence that a protected business invariant was violated or threatened.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.InvariantViolationEvidence.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Observable evidence that a protected business invariant was violated or threatened.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.InvariantViolationEvidence.EvidenceType
member.summary: Stable classifier for invariant violation evidence.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.SideEffectEvidence
member.summary: Observable evidence that an external side effect was intended, attempted, completed, skipped, or failed.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Observability.SideEffectEvidence.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Observable evidence that an external side effect was intended, attempted, completed, skipped, or failed.
